title: PM Lane 287 - Project Miner Temp Power Downstream Rule Question Card No-Live Packet
authority_basis: Jason's 2026-05-18 standing PM blocker authority as repo technical authority and project stakeholder.
purpose: Convert the PM Lane 286 missing downstream rule questions into a compact Jason-facing answer card.
Keep all returned answers no-live and non-mutating.
Classify any returned answer before a later design or live-admission packet.
Preserve all downstream output blocks until explicit separate admission.

source_baseline.prior_lane: PM Lane 286 - Project Miner Temp Power Post-Pilot Reconciliation And Delivery Rules Binder No-Live Packet

actuals_and_labor_rules: Approval required before billable or payroll relevance
customer_report_and_delivery_rules: Evidence required to prove customer delivery
billing_and_invoice_rules: Billable, non-billable, included, excluded, taxable, or withheld rows
Billing export required before invoice creation
Approval required before invoice creation or customer delivery
payroll_rules: Payroll classifications, pay codes, overtime rules, and cutoff dates
Payroll export allowed, preview only, or blocked
Approval required before payroll export or payroll record creation
accounting_and_external_finance_rules: Accounting system, entity, customer account, item codes, GL codes, cost codes, and tax treatment
Secret, credential, endpoint, or integration boundary requiring separate admission
source_writeback_and_macro_rules: Separate source authority packet required before any action

classifier.condition: Jason gives no downstream rules or selects hold.
classifier.next_move: Keep all output blocked; route to a later hold, refresh, or answer-card return intake.

classifier.condition: Jason gives actuals, labor, progress, customer report, completion evidence, or customer delivery rules only.
classifier.next_move: Prepare a no-live actuals/customer capture design packet; no writes.

classifier.condition: Jason gives billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, labor reconciliation, customer billing delivery, or external finance rules only.
classifier.next_move: Prepare a no-live finance output design packet; no exports or records.

classifier.condition: Jason gives both actuals/customer and finance rules.
classifier.next_move: Split into bounded no-live design packets before any live admission.

classifier.condition: Jason requests production, customer, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, sync, or other output writes.
classifier.next_move: Stop for a separate admitted write packet with exact proof gates.

classifier.condition: Jason requests source workbook/PDF writeback or macro execution.
classifier.next_move: Stop for a separate source authority packet.
